steps.title: Follow the frequency shift
steps.content: The previous sentence says modern via ferratas are rarely designed simply to reach a summit. The next sentence describes what the new routes favor instead: recreation, challenge, and dramatic scenery. The transition should mark the more common pattern.

steps.title: Avoid false contrast
steps.content: Choice A adds another point rather than marking a replacement pattern. Choice B creates an unnecessary contrast, and Choice D suggests an unexpected contradiction. The sentence needs a phrase that means this is what happens more frequently. The answer is C.
